reviews.review_description: I LIKE THIS GAME SO FRICKING MUCH, DEV IF YOU SEEING THIS PLEASE ADD DIE OF DEATH CHARACTERS (or you already)

This game is absolute peak. honestly it is a break from all the generic tag copies and was actually fun! and I REALLY wish it didnt get cancelled. If done right, this game could be up there with AC,GTAG,yeeps,and UG, this game was a really cool concept with LMS, Nextbots and GTAG movement. However i do understand why he cancelled it, apparently he (not to sound rude.) screwed up the game while he was updating the game. (according to the discord server.) Plus The owner makes animations on tiktok and where ever else. so clear if you're reading this, you are cool beans.

Hi I am agentserver04, I am a kinda popular YouTuber and a forsaken fanatic. I love the style of this game and would love to play this, and promote it. Please don’t give up hope, stay committed to the game your dreams and your fans. Work at your own pace we are not rushing you, have fun with your game and if it’s okay with you… maybe I could be a beta tester?

Sure. V2 Is Great With The Refs. But overall Some Bugs Annoy Me.

So here is my List Of Bugs: The Fling Bug: By now this happened to everyone where you get flung for no reason? And just stick to walls. Everyone knows this by now.

Server Bugs: Now This Isnt Really An Issue Or Bug But Whenever You Join A Lobby From That Mini Menu And Join A Lobby With PPL in it Theres no one?

Park Bug: Now I Dunno If Its Apart Of The Map But The Wind Ranges Are Really Bad. I Can Get Stuck From Wind When Im Not Even Near A Tree?

Thats my List Of Bugs. now Hey. I Know it just Released V2. 

Here Is 1 Map Idea: A Facility It Would Be Kinda Fun If You Actually Had An Objective So You Need To Power On Generators. I Feel Like Giving The Friend Nextbot (JSaB) A Higher Spawnrate On This Map Cause A Chapter In Story Mode Of JSaB Does Take Place In A Facility Like Area.




Thank You For Taking Your Time To Read This Review And Have A Great Day Or Night!
When the text said --you can close the game-- i closed but when i joinded back the text came back and said the whole entire thing again idk if that's the game or that's me

reviews.review_title: explaining why this game is fun
reviews.review_description: this game is very fun because the servers  are sometimes empty and you could invite your friends and i'm gonna be honest the monsters are little easy except for some of them and it's like challenging but fun so invite your friends to play because it's very fun and yeah

This game is fun to play after a long day or just for fun, the people are nice and the chase themes are definitely above average with some being absolute bangers, I highly recommend for a simple game to get that adrenaline flowing. 5 stars

I LOVE that the game works now but theres a bug where we touch the trees we get flung and get stuck when we die so could that get fixed? but anyways i love the songs`nextbots`and the maps so 10/10👌👌👌👍👍👍
I am kinda new to the game but running from things is so fun to do! But I want you to add more promo codes so I can be rich.
low quality, very buggy, and not fun in general like I can only play for 5 minutes until i get bored (my opinion btw)

I’m going to be honest with my review here. This game is amazing for just coming out. There’s a community already, fun nextbots to run from, cool cosmetics, cool references, and so much more. If you want to ease yourself from complex games, just play this. It’s fun, simple and definitely worth my time. 10/10
